criteria.criterion: DBB-001: Multi-round tool loop continues until completion (stopReason !== 'tool_use')
DBB-002: Multi-round loop respects MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS (10 rounds, throws after)
DBB-003: images field populated from tool results
DBB-004: images field is empty array (not undefined) when no tool returns images
DBB-005: ask() accepts optional systemPrompt and passes to provider
DBB-007: file_read and file_write work in browser environment via AgenticFileSystem
DBB-008: file_read on non-existent file returns error result (not crash)
DBB-009: code_exec runs JavaScript and captures console output
DBB-010: code_exec supports async code via newAsyncContext
DBB-012: End-to-end agentic task: write → read → exec
DBB-013: Custom provider can be passed to ask()
